narrative.headline: What 2015 Kia Optima owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints dominate owner reports, with drivers describing abnormal noises that arise without warning while the vehicle is in motion. Electrical system and brake failures also appear, including fires originating inside the cabin and loss of vehicle control during braking. A smaller share of reports involves structural concerns, typically noted in the context of traffic incidents.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report abnormal noises emanating from the engine that occur without warning while driving at low speeds. · 47 fire · 9 crash · 9 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle catching fire while stationary, with smoke detected coming from the cabin near the steering column. · 24 fire · 4 crash · 5 injured

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report complete brake failure at highway speeds, resulting in loss of vehicle control and departure from the roadway. · 12 fire · 5 crash · 4 injured

issues.title: Structure
